summary: Iteration 2 backend testing: 27 new tests added for Invite Links + Trip Docs (GridFS), all passed. 28 iteration-1 regression tests re-run, all still pass. Combined 55/55 = 100% backend success.
action_items: Optional: TripCreateBody currently only accepts member_names (list of strings). To enable email-stub invites end-to-end via API (so a user can be added by email and later attach themselves via accept-invite), extend TripCreateBody to accept a list of {name, email} member objects. The backend accept_invite logic already supports the attach-by-email branch correctly — verified via direct Mongo seeding.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1078 lines — consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/trips.py, routers/invite.py, routers/docs.py, routers/ai.py for maintainability (>700 line guideline).

In download_doc (server.py:867), ObjectId(meta['gridfs_id']) is wrapped in try/except returning 404. Bson InvalidId would also map to 'File missing in storage' which is misleading — could differentiate 'corrupted metadata' vs 'storage missing'. Minor.
GridFS bucket name not asserted in tests; relies on review_request statement ('trip_docs'). Functional correctness validated end-to-end via upload→download bytes match and delete→download 404 cycle.

accept_invite returns full member object only on 'joined'; on 'already_member' it does not echo the (possibly updated) member. Acceptable but could improve client UX by returning the resolved member doc.
test_credentials: demo@tripsplit.app / Demo@123 (verified working). New test users created on the fly via /api/auth/register with unique emails per test (TEST_*).
seed_data_creation: Tests create per-module trips and per-test users with unique emails (uuid-based). One test seeds an email-only stub member directly via pymongo (cannot be done via current TripCreate API).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 added 27 tests in /app/backend/tests/test_invite_and_docs.py covering: invite get/rotate/preview/accept (incl. idempotency, email-stub attach, rotation invalidates old token), docs upload (PDF/PNG, type & size & empty validation), list/download (Bearer + ?token= query for img/iframe), permissions (non-member 403, owner+uploader can delete, other members 403), and GridFS cleanup (delete -> list & download both 404). All 55 tests run in ~24s. Server runs on supervisor, accessed via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. To run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. The test_accept_attaches_user_id_to_email_stub test seeds the stub directly into Mongo because the TripCreate API doesn't yet accept email-only members.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures after final run.
